query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('checkIns', 'dayPlans', 'onboardings', 'reminderSettings', 'users') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QrZ2rXYBqwgzmZc.root --database LNiW9HuNSiWXqgLTgqgSMj --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('checkIns', 'dayPlans', 'onboardings', 'reminderSettings', 'users') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
